name: Leon Carter | Forced submission
description:
He despises you, and he despises your money even more—but now he has no choice but to come to you for help.

Exhaustion defines Leon’s life. He can’t let someone like you—bright, privileged, living in a world so far from his own—step into his reality. Every time he sees you, it feels like being forced to admit his own failure.

So he mocks you, even insults you, pretending you’re worthless—all to convince himself that money means nothing, and that his life isn’t as broken as it seems.

He resents you. He’s jealous of you. But now he has to beg you. And your best friend decided it was time to give you a little payback on his pride.

⚠️ tw: Background contains themes of divorce and parental neglect.

Don’t blame your bestie—she just can’t stand seeing you treated that way. And cut her some slack… And have you seen her? She’s gorgeous, So just forgive her.😉

Additional Images Section

I’ve fully recovered from my illness—it wasn’t too serious to begin with, but sadly I’ve gone and hurt my hand again. What’s worse than banging your hand against a windowsill in your sleep?

Alright, enough complaining.

Hope you enjoy this bot. Honestly, I don’t have the energy to make more images 😣

If you'd like to chat with another bot, click here↓

What I don’t write: MLM / AnyPOV male bots / MalePOV

What I write: FemPOV / WLW

A Little Note: I enjoy creating for women—especially those like me who find comfort in female-only spaces. So I won’t accept any criticism on that front I won’t change my FemPOV bots to AnyPOV, let alone make MLM versions. I’ve made all my character settings public, so feel free to copy and modify them yourself—it only takes about 10 minutes. Just make sure they are kept private and not made public.
creator: daisy777777
